name: ensure-git-repo
reason: .git/ already present

name: sync-registries
error: Command failed: pnpm exec tsx scripts/sync-registries.ts

name: generate-theme-css
error: Command failed: pnpm exec tsx scripts/generate-theme-css.ts

name: sync-test-contracts
error: Command failed: pnpm exec tsx scripts/sync-test-contracts.ts

name: sync-project-index
error: Command failed: pnpm exec tsx scripts/sync-project-index.ts

name: Running under shell / other -- .claude/hooks/* will NOT fire
reason: Hooks only execute inside the Claude Code CLI. Rely on husky + CI for enforcement in other environments.

name: VERCEL_TOKEN not set
reason: Add VERCEL_TOKEN to your .env file

name: core.hooksPath is '.husky/_' -- Husky hooks will NOT fire
reason: Run: git config core.hooksPath .husky

name: 3 dangling hook references in settings.json
reason: Add the missing files or remove the references: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-check.sh;, $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/agent-comms.sh, $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/post-push-pm.sh

name: 5 skills have issues: compliance-fix (missing frontmatter); context7-first (missing frontmatter); observability-debug (missing frontmatter); visual-qa (missing frontmatter); wire-telemetry (missing frontmatter)
reason: Each skill needs SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter containing name and description.

name: Core incomplete (missing: lib/project.config.ts, lib/ai/tools/_types.ts)
reason: Run ai-dev-kit init to regenerate module files

name: 19 API routes not wrapped with withRoute()
reason: Wrap with `withRoute(async (req, ctx) => { ... })` so errors are logged and responses include request ids. First offender: app/api/dev-kit/config/[name]/route.ts

name: 1 file call AI SDK streamText/generateText without withTelemetry()
reason: Wrap the model: `withTelemetry(gateway('anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5'), { userId, label: 'summarize' })` and call `await logAICall({...})` after the stream completes. Without this, Langfuse + /dev-kit dashboard show nothing. First offender: app/api/dev-kit/cost/route.ts

name: Langfuse imported but LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY / LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY not set
reason: Set both keys in .env.local. Without them, instrumentation.ts still loads (graceful degradation) but zero traces reach Langfuse.

name: /dev-kit dashboard installed but no ai_logs migration found
reason: Dashboard will show empty / error. Apply the telemetry migration or remove the dashboard pages.

name: No .ai-dev-kit/notify.yaml configured (template present)
reason: Copy notify.yaml.template to notify.yaml, pick a ntfy topic, subscribe via ntfy.sh or the mobile app. Without this, harness blockers never reach you.

name: No vendor registries yet (add with `ai-dev-kit registry add <vendor>`)
No visual-regression spec for pages
reason: Copy templates/tests/e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts. The UI requirements rule demands it.

name: No accessibility testing library detected
reason: Install vitest-axe or @axe-core/playwright. The UI requirements rule demands `a11y` verification.

name: Playwright config missing viewport/theme projects (have 0/4)
reason: Add projects for mobile-light, mobile-dark, desktop-light, desktop-dark. See templates/playwright.config.ts.

name: No docs/brand-guide.md or docs/style-guide.md found
reason: Component work without a visible guide produces inconsistent output. Create one.

name: No auth path configured for AI calls
reason: Run `ai-dev-kit connect` to set AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY, or run inside a Claude Code session.

name: 3 expected MCP servers wired (context7, firecrawl, playwright)
Context7 MCP package resolves (health check OK)
Run history dir missing
reason: Will be auto-created on first SessionStart

name: design-tokens.yaml empty
reason: Fill in colors/typography/spacing to turn on brand-token enforcement

name: budget.yaml present with per_run hard limit
docs/brand-guide.md missing
reason: Copy templates/docs/brand-guide.md.template

name: docs/style-guide.md missing
reason: Copy templates/docs/style-guide.md.template

name: million installed but next.config does not import million/next or million/compiler
reason: v3: import million from "million/compiler"; v2: import millionNext from "million/next"

name: 174 components not declared in design-system.yaml: action-item-row, add-context-picker, admin-settings, code-block, conversation...
reason: Either declare them as primitives/molecules/organisms in design-system.yaml OR remove them if one-off

name: 10 design-system entries have no matching component: Button, Input, Text, Icon, Badge...
reason: Implement the component(s) OR remove the declaration(s) from design-system.yaml

name: No features with SPEC.md yet -- skipping
No known CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM vulnerabilities
claude hook record-kit-event.py exists but is NOT wired in settings.json
reason: `.claude/hooks/record-kit-event.py` exists but is NOT wired in `.claude/settings.json` -- claude won't fire it.
